sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ خَرُوفٌ أَبْيَضُ يَأْكُلُ الْعُشْبَ بِجَانِبِ الْجَبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Bila je bijela ovca koja je jela travu pored planine.
sentences.translationEn: There was a white sheep eating grass beside the mountain.

sentences.arabic: رَأَتْ زَهْرَةً حَمْرَاءَ بَعِيدَةً وَمَشَتْ نَحْوَهَا.
sentences.translation: Ugledala je crveni cvijet daleko i krenula prema njemu.
sentences.translationEn: It saw a red flower far away and walked toward it.

sentences.arabic: ضَاعَتْ وَلَمْ تَجِدِ الطَّرِيقَ إِلَى الْقَطِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Zalutala je i nije mogla naći put do stada.
sentences.translationEn: It got lost and could not find the way back to the flock.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ صَوْتَ رَاعِيهَا فَرَكَضَتْ نَحْوَهُ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Čula je glas svog pastira i brzo je potrčala prema njemu.
sentences.translationEn: It heard its shepherd's voice and ran quickly toward it.
